query: SELECT rowid,code,state,totaleligiblepct,employeespct,employeesmsg,equipmentpct,equipmentmsg,managementcooperationpct,managementcooperationmsg,medicalfacilitiespct,medicalfacilitiesmsg,policyexpensespct,policyexpensesmsg,premisespct,premisesmsg,riskcharacteristicspct,riskcharacteristicsmsg,safetypct,safetymsg,enteredon,enteredby,updatedon,updatedby,totalapplicablepct,isnull(updatedon, enteredon) as dl_watermark FROM dbo.wcautopricing WHERE isnull(updatedon, enteredon) > CAST('2026-06-21 22:21:47.027000' AS datetime2)
